purpose: PostToolUse hook on Write. Validates that the latest entry in dashboards/{id}/logs.json has the required fields (timestamp, task_id, agent, level, message) and a valid level value (info|warn|error|deviation|permission|debug). PostToolUse cannot block (write already landed) — emits a `{message: ...}` warning the agent sees. Reads the file from disk after the write (not from tool_input) so it sees the actual state. Skips if not a logs.json file, file missing, or invalid JSON.
gotchas: Validates only the LAST entry (entries[-1]) — older malformed entries slip through
PostToolUse cannot block — only warn; the file is already on disk
Reads file from disk (cat $FILE_PATH), not from tool_input.content — sees post-write state
Level enum is fixed: info/warn/error/deviation/permission/debug — adding a new level requires updating this hook
